name: sehat-saathi
description: Sehat Saathi (صحت ساتھی) — Pakistani Rx photo to Urdu-friendly medicine cards: parallel DeepSeek OCR + vision VLM + Llama JSON via Regolo, Express proxy, Railway-ready, health tools & analytics.

scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -n proxy,vite -c blue,green "node server.js" "npm run dev"
